goose_game.title: Goose Game
goose_game.description: A path of challenges and discoveries
goose_game.checkpoint_message: You reached square {number}! You deserve a little celebration.
goose_game.well_escape: Escape the well with a sincere compliment!
goose_game.inn_message: Romantic break: choose a position from the catalog
goose_game.subtitle_description: 100 squares • 4 garments each • Ladders, Holes and Penances 🔥
goose_game.quick_rule_every20: Every 20 squares passed: opponent removes a garment
goose_game.tutorial_welcome_body: The Spicy Goose Game is a couples game on 100 squares, full of steamy rewards, hot penances and twists! Whoever reaches square 100 wins and gets a special reward from their partner 😈
goose_game.tutorial_clothing_body: Each player starts with 4 garments. As the game progresses, you'll lose them... If you have no more garments to remove, a spicy penance kicks in! 🔥
goose_game.tutorial_exit_body:
To leave square 0 you must roll 4, 5 or 6. If you fail for TWO consecutive turns, your partner removes one of your garments!

When you leave, roll the dice again to move.
goose_game.tutorial_rule20_body:
Every time you pass a multiple of 20 (squares 20, 40, 60, 80), your opponent must remove a garment!

Advance quickly to undress your partner 😏
goose_game.tutorial_ladders_body:
🪜 LADDER: jump forward to a higher square and receive a reward from your partner!

🕳️ HOLE: go back to a lower square and you must perform a penance for your partner!
goose_game.tutorial_penance_body:
Scattered across the board are Penance squares 🔥

If you land on one, draw a spicy penance and... perform it! No excuses! 😈
goose_game.tutorial_six_body:
If you roll a 6, roll again!

You can do this up to 2 consecutive times (so 3 rolls total per turn). Take advantage to make the biggest leap! 🚀
goose_game.tutorial_timer_body:
Some rewards and penances have a timer!

When the countdown appears, you must perform the action for the entire indicated time. The timer starts automatically. Ready? 😉
goose_game.tutorial_victory_body:
Whoever reaches exactly square 100 wins!

If your roll takes you past 100, you bounce back. The winner receives a special reward from their partner!

Have fun! 🎉
goose_game.reward_description: Receive a reward from your partner:
goose_game.penance_do: Perform a penance for your partner:
goose_game.final_prize: 🔥 FINAL PRIZE — The loser's partner performs:
goose_game.rule_ladder: Ladder: advance and receive a reward
goose_game.rule_hole: Hole: go back and perform a penance
goose_game.rule_exit: Leave start with 4/5/6. 2 fails → partner undresses
goose_game.rule_exit_roll: When you exit, roll again to move
goose_game.rule_six: Roll a 6 → roll again! Max 2 extra times

wheel.title: Wheel of Fortune
wheel.subtitle: Romantic Edition
wheel.rule_1: Choose the intensity: Soft, Spicy or Extra 🔥
wheel.rule_2: Tap the center of the wheel to spin it
wheel.rule_3: Perform the action shown with your partner
wheel.rule_4: You can always skip and spin again
wheel.consent_reminder:
Remember: consent comes first!
Have fun safely.

hot_cold.subtitle: Guided only by words

hot_cold.rule_3: The closer you get, the 'hotter' it becomes!
hot_cold.rule_4: When you find the right zone... prize!

love_notes.title: Love Notes
love_notes.subtitle: Write from the heart
love_notes.rule_1: Write a secret message to your partner
love_notes.rule_2: Don't let them see what you write!
love_notes.rule_3: At the end, read them together out loud
love_notes.rule_4: Keep your favorites as a memory

narrative.body:
Imagine being at {setting}. The atmosphere is {mood}. You start with {action}, while a {surprise} makes everything even more memorable. {customDetails}

Let the fantasy carry you and make it real when you feel ready! 💫

rules.rule_4: At the end, decide when to make it real!

compliment_battle.title: Compliment Battle
compliment_battle.subtitle: Who appreciates more?
compliment_battle.made_partner_special: You made your partner feel special!
compliment_battle.winner_reward: The winner deserves a special prize! 🎁
compliment_battle.quick_rules_desc: You get a category, give a sincere compliment to your partner before time runs out. Faster = more points!
compliment_battle.rule2: Give a sincere compliment to your partner
compliment_battle.rule3: The faster you answer, the more points you earn
compliment_battle.rule4: Then it's the other's turn with the same category
compliment_battle.rule5: Whoever has the most points wins!

question_quest.title: Question Quest
question_quest.subtitle: 36 questions to (re)fall in love
question_quest.q_light_dreams_1: What's the strangest dream you remember?
question_quest.q_light_dreams_2: If you could dream anything tonight, what would you choose?
question_quest.q_light_dreams_3: Have you ever had a recurring dream?
question_quest.q_light_memories_2: What was the funniest moment in your life?
question_quest.q_light_memories_3: Tell me your favorite memory of us.
question_quest.q_light_desires_1: What small pleasure makes you happy?
question_quest.q_light_desires_2: What would you like to do this weekend?
question_quest.q_light_fears_1: What's the funniest thing you're afraid of?
question_quest.q_light_fears_2: Are you afraid of the dark?
question_quest.q_light_fears_3: What's the last thing that scared you in a movie?
question_quest.q_light_future_1: Where do you see yourself in 5 years?
question_quest.q_light_future_2: What's the next trip you'd like to take?
question_quest.q_light_future_3: What would you like to learn to do?
question_quest.q_light_intimacy_1: What's your favorite way to receive affection?
question_quest.q_light_intimacy_2: Do you prefer morning or evening cuddles?
question_quest.q_light_intimacy_3: What's the nicest compliment I've given you?
question_quest.q_medium_dreams_1: If you could make one impossible dream come true, what would it be?
question_quest.q_medium_dreams_2: What's a dream you gave up on and why?
question_quest.q_medium_dreams_3: What does 'being successful' mean to you?
question_quest.q_medium_memories_1: When were you most proud of yourself?
question_quest.q_medium_memories_2: Tell me about a difficult time that made you stronger.
question_quest.q_medium_memories_3: What's your most precious family memory?
question_quest.q_medium_desires_1: What do you desire most right now in your life?
question_quest.q_medium_desires_2: Is there something you've never dared to ask me?
question_quest.q_medium_fears_1: What's your biggest fear about the future?
question_quest.q_medium_fears_2: Is there something you avoid doing out of fear?
question_quest.q_medium_fears_3: When was the last time you faced a fear?
question_quest.q_medium_future_1: How do you imagine our life in 10 years?
question_quest.q_medium_future_2: What's a goal you absolutely want to achieve?
question_quest.q_medium_future_3: If you could change one thing about your future, what would it be?
question_quest.q_medium_intimacy_1: What makes you feel most loved?
question_quest.q_medium_intimacy_2: When did you feel most connected to me?
question_quest.q_medium_intimacy_3: Is there something you'd like to improve in our intimacy?
question_quest.q_deep_dreams_1: If today were your last day, what would you regret?
question_quest.q_deep_dreams_2: What's the dream you've never told anyone?
question_quest.q_deep_dreams_3: What would you sacrifice to fulfill your biggest dream?
question_quest.q_deep_memories_1: What moment changed your life forever?
question_quest.q_deep_memories_2: Is there a painful memory that still haunts you?
question_quest.q_deep_memories_3: What's the most important lesson life has taught you?
question_quest.q_deep_desires_1: What's the deepest desire of your heart?
question_quest.q_deep_desires_2: What do you truly desire from our relationship?
question_quest.q_deep_desires_3: If you could get an answer to any question, what would you ask?
question_quest.q_deep_fears_1: What fear keeps you awake at night?
question_quest.q_deep_fears_2: What are you afraid of in our relationship?
question_quest.q_deep_fears_3: What's the truth you're afraid to face?
question_quest.q_deep_future_1: What do you want to be remembered for?
question_quest.q_deep_future_3: How do you want to grow old together?
question_quest.q_deep_intimacy_1: What's the most vulnerable thing you can share with me?
question_quest.q_deep_intimacy_2: What does true love mean to you?
question_quest.q_deep_intimacy_3: When did you feel completely safe with me?

soft.hand_massage_desc: Gently massage your partner's hands, finger by finger.

soft.sync_breathing_desc: Lie down and synchronize your breathing. Inhale and exhale together.
soft.light_caresses_desc: Caress your partner's face with your fingertips, slowly.

spicy.exploring_kisses_desc: Kiss every part of your partner's face: forehead, cheeks, nose, chin...
spicy.neck_massage_desc: Massage your partner's neck and shoulders, finding tension points.
spicy.total_hug_desc: Hug tightly, feel each other's heartbeat.
spicy.slow_dance_desc: Dance slowly in each other's arms, even without music.
spicy.blind_touch_desc: Close your eyes and let your partner guide your hands over them.

extra_spicy.sensitive_spots_desc: Explore your partner's most sensitive neck areas with your lips.
extra_spicy.back_massage_desc: Deep massage on the back, from shoulders to hips.
extra_spicy.kisses_everywhere_desc: Kiss every inch of your partner's arms, from wrist to shoulder.
extra_spicy.tactile_exploration_desc: With eyes closed, memorize your partner's body using only touch.
extra_spicy.total_connection_desc: Lie skin to skin, feel each other's warmth.

mirror_challenge.title: Mirror Challenge
mirror_challenge.subtitle: Connection without words
mirror_challenge.subtitle_desc: Move as if you were one person
mirror_challenge.instruction_1: One partner leads, the other mirrors
mirror_challenge.connection_builds: Connection is built one movement at a time.
mirror_challenge.ch1_desc: Move your hands slowly like a ballet. The mirror follows you.
mirror_challenge.ch2_desc: Change your facial expression slowly. The mirror copies every nuance.
mirror_challenge.ch2_tip: Exaggerate expressions to make copying easier
mirror_challenge.ch3_desc: Move your whole body: arms, torso, legs. The mirror follows completely.
mirror_challenge.ch4_desc: Guide the breathing rhythm with hand gestures. The mirror breathes with you.
mirror_challenge.ch4_tip: Use your hands to show inhaling and exhaling
mirror_challenge.ch5_desc: Close your eyes and move. The mirror must follow with their sixth sense.
mirror_challenge.ch6_desc: Move in extreme slow motion. Each gesture should last seconds.
mirror_challenge.ch7_desc: Move your hands as if touching an invisible glass between you.
mirror_challenge.ch7_tip: Imagine feeling the warmth of each other's hands
mirror_challenge.ch8_desc: Create a dance together, without music. Let instinct guide you.
mirror_challenge.ch8_tip: Don't think, just go with the flow
